methodology: Retrospective planning estimates for first-parent modernization implementation check-ins before completion estimates existed. The cumulative percentages are monotonic and calibrated to the first explicit progress-ledger estimate, 52.7% at 40822fd8 on 2026-06-21. Implementation commits carry most of the movement; documentation, metadata, and changelog checkpoint commits receive tiny increments so their timestamps remain visible without overstating functional scope.
